name.en: Destruction Chant of the Sacred Beast
name.ja: <ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt>ごう</rt></ruby><ruby>殺<rt>さつ</rt></ruby>

text.en: Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand or GY in Defense Position, then if you control 2 or more "Sacred Beast" monsters whose original Levels are 10, you can negate the effects of 1 face-up card your opponent controls, and if you do, destroy it. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Phantasm" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. You can only use each effect of "Destruction Chant of the Sacred Beast" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：从自己手牌・墓地将1只“三幻魔”怪兽以守备表示特殊召唤。然后，自己场上存在2只以上原本等级为10的“三幻魔”怪兽的情况下，可将对手场上的1张表侧表示卡的效果无效并破坏。②：将墓地的此卡除外可以发动。将自己手牌・场上的怪兽作为融合素材，将1只“幻魔”融合怪兽融合召唤。
